string.text: Here we are.
Borland, hurry up - we need to move forward.

Don't rush, Shroud, you're not leading a squad here. Who knows what creatures have infested this lab anyway. If you hear anything suspicious, don't make any noise. But if you see something... remember what you were taught - always have a spare magazine at hand.
We'll make it.
Damn, how did he manage to get to me like that...
Are you okay?
Yeah, I'm alive, just got a splitting headache - thanks for saving my ass.
You can thank me later, our problems are just starting.
We'll manage. Man, if it weren't for you...
Let's move, I'll cover you.
Oh damn, looks like we have trouble.
What kind of trouble?
No power. That's why the elevator isn't working. What are we going to do?
There must be a backup generator somewhere. Stay here, I'll try to find it. Stay in touch, I'll let you know when the power is back on.
Be careful, call for help if you need it.
Don't worry, I'll handle it.
Damn, I made it.
What the hell is going on down here!
Welcome to hell. This is the lower level. Looks like there's an ambush ahead.
Are we going to force our way through or bypass them through the sewer?
Forget it, we're already close to target, I'll open the door for you now. You'll manage, it's not your first time.
Okay.
I'll stay near the cameras, need to find the internal layout plan.
Maybe you can cover me instead?
I'm almost out of bullets and we don't stand a chance together in that narrow corridor. You can handle it alone - I'll create a voltage spike here so you can slip through.
Okay.
